reviews.comment:
Paré 23.30. y al pedir algo para cenar solo ofrecían sandwiches fríos. Pedí calentar en microondas y no hubo caso. 0 empatía. Con el viajero que viene de recorrer muchos km. Cuánto puede demorar calentar un sándwich en microondas?? Con 1 grado bajo 0 afuera

(Translated by Google)
I stopped at 11:30 PM and when I asked for something to eat, they only offered cold sandwiches. I asked to have it microwaved, but it was no use. Zero empathy. How long should it take to heat a sandwich in a microwave for a traveler who's come from so far? It was -1°C outside.

reviewReply.comment: Lamentamos su experiencia
